thirty_k_foot_summary.primary_attack_surface: mask stream with scorer-constrained learned/grammar repair, not human visual smoothing
thirty_k_foot_summary.secondary_attack_surface: renderer self-compression only after local byte win
thirty_k_foot_summary.tertiary_attack_surface: pose bytes and archive overhead are too small to close the full sub-0.300 gap alone
